use_cases: Adding categorical tags to content or products in a content management system
Collecting multiple keyword or topic selections in a form submission
Creating audience or interest segments in a creator or marketing platform
Managing filter selections in an e-commerce or listing interface
ai_summary: A tag-input component that allows users to create and manage tags by typing and pressing Enter, with smooth blur-scale animations on tag creation and removal. Features glass-morphism styling with backdrop-blur, spring-based motion transitions, and keyboard navigation support for accessibility.
